body_txt: Water can be one of the most dangerous things in a horror film. You're not likely to drown in it, but there are other reasons to avoid it like the plague:  If this trope is in effect and the killer is not human, then the monster is often a hideous water-dwelling creature. Compare Drowning Pit (water as Death Trap ), Super Drowning Skills (where water acts like a Bottomless Pit ), Grimy Water (where going into the water hurts you), Murder Water (where the water itself is actively trying to kill you ). This item is available in the Trope Co. catalog.
